---
title: "Second_assigment"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-18"

params:
  gene_1: "NFKBIA"
  alt_gene1: NULL
  
  gene_2: "CXCL8"
  alt_gene2: "IL8"

#row =gene
#colums =patients_ID
---

```{r}

source("functions/leukemia_lib/getData.R")
```

```{r}
 gene1_data <- get_all_data(params$gene_1) #get expression data 

```

```{r}
gene2_data <- get_all_data(params$gene_2)
alt_gene2_data <- get_all_data(params$alt_gene2)
```
```{r}
calculate_cor <- function(g1, g2) { 
  if (is.null(g1$X) || is.null(g2$X)) return(NA)
  
  x <- as.numeric(g1$X[1, ]) 
  y <- as.numeric(g2$X[1, ])
  
  if (is.null(x) || is.null(y)) return(NA)
  
  cor(x, y, use = "complete.obs")
}
```


```{r}
for (nm in names(gene2_data)) {
  if (is.null(gene2_data[[nm]]$X) && !is.null(alt_gene2_data[[nm]]$X)) {
  gene2_data[[nm]] <- alt_gene2_data[[nm]]
  }
}

new_variable <- Map(calculate_cor, gene1_data, gene2_data)
print(new_variable)


```
